name: Coding (LeetCode)
accuracy_detail: Each model generates a Python solve() function. We run it against hidden test cases. A task passes if all asserts succeed.
why_this_metric: pass@1 measures whether the model produces correct code on the first attempt — the most realistic usage pattern.

name: Logical Reasoning
accuracy_detail: Multiple-choice questions testing syllogisms, patterns, and deduction. The model must respond with the correct letter.
why_this_metric: Multiple-choice removes ambiguity in evaluation — the answer is objectively right or wrong.

name: Math (High School)
accuracy_detail: Multiple-choice questions covering algebra, geometry, statistics, functions, and fractions at high school level.
why_this_metric: Tests mathematical reasoning across diverse topics. Multiple-choice format enables unambiguous scoring.
